headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Corning (GLW) After Its 269% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Corning at around US$181 per share still offers value or is looking stretched, the numbers behind the stock can help frame that question clearly. The share price is down 6.6% over the past week, up 14.5% over the past month, up 99.8% year to date, and has a 1 year return of 269.3%, with a very large 3 year return and a strong 5 year gain as well. These moves sit against a backdrop where Corning continues to attract attention as a key US technology stock, and...
